name: metal room
hints: This room has several important items. Examine everything - the console, block, and sign all matter.
READ the sign for important information. The plastic block can be taken. The console may have controls to operate.
GET BLOCK - you will need the plastic block later. READ SIGN for clues. Be very careful with the force field here - going through it is DEADLY.
The force fields lead to death. Use the normal exit EAST to continue through the tunnel system.
notes: Metal room with control console and important items. The large plastic block is a key inventory item. The neon sign provides clues. WARNING: going through the force field in either direction causes death. Use the east exit to the tunnel instead.
